title: Outland Mining
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Outland Mining''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] company that existed during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It had a private large [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], however it was eventually dissolved by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] following the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]] due to the threat posed by organizations with cooperate militaries like the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].

{{Company-stub}}

*''[[Rogue Planet]]''
